limitation: These are rich prediction forensics, not causal execution traces. Per-record particle paths were not keyed in the compact numeric artifact.
selection: six deterministic test traces per domain

beliefs_or_signals.message_body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Kaminski, Vince J 
Sent: Thursday, October 04, 2001 8:28 AM
To: Siurek, Ryan
Cc: Kaminski, Vince J; Buy, Rick; Port, David
Subject: LJM/Raptor valuations

Ryan,

In the follow up to the meeting we had on Wednesday I would like
to reinforce one point I made. I feel strongly that I cannot support
the valuations my group has produced so far for the LJM/Raptor
related transactions without examination of all the related legal documents.

I feel that we did solid work based on verbal information, but I cannot
guarantee the quality of the final product without looking at the contracts.
These transactions are too complex and controversial to bypass due diligence requirements 
that you would expect from any professional.

Vince Kaminski
beliefs_or_signals.subject: FW: LJM/Raptor valuations

Love you
The Pigs

 From: Angelica Marie Paez <jhgriff@earthlink.net>@ENRON
 Sent: Monday, November 26, 2001 11:38 AM
 To: Griffith, John
 Subject: FW: Question for seller -- Item #1038949049

 Angelica Paez <jhgriff@earthlink.net>

 ----------
 From: "Todd Hoffman" <thoffman@rochelle.net>
 Date: Mon, 26 Nov 2001 11:54:03 -0000
 To: "Angelica Marie Paez" <jhgriff@earthlink.net>
 Subject: RE: Question for seller -- Item #1038949049
 Sure of course I understand Angelica. I love your Lacoste vintage also!
 As for the Fila warm-up, I've been looking long time for one and can
 never find right size/cond. This one seems it. So perhaps I will be
 lucky in the end. My offer would be for $400 + if you're
 wondering........or change your mind this one little time.
 Best,
 Todd

beliefs_or_signals.message_body:
I'm sure she knows him. How well will be interesting?

Jim

-----Original Message----- 
From: Dasovich, Jeff 
Sent: Sun 10/7/2001 10:12 AM 
To: Steffes, James D. 
Cc: 
Subject: RE: Do you know Laura Doll?

Thanks. I guess Davis' people think that we'll back off if they put someone from Texas in charge. Perhaps they're looking for someone who knows Pat Wood. Be useful to find out if she knows him.
 
Best,
Jeff

-----Original Message----- 
From: Steffes, James D. 
Sent: Sun 10/7/2001 9:48 AM 
To: Ryall, Jean 
Cc: Dasovich, Jeff 
Subject: Do you know Laura Doll?

Jean --
 
Laura Doll has been appointed head of the CA Power Authority. Do you know her? It would be good to have an introduction for Jeff Dasovich.
 
Jim

beliefs_or_signals.message_body:
thanks for your help. Due to my lack of a complete understanding of VaR, can you give me a lesson if you find out exactly why. All I have ever changed are the correlations. Thanks.
PL

 -----Original Message-----
From: Khanna, Bharat 
Sent: Friday, October 05, 2001 8:57 AM
To: Love, Phillip M.
Subject: RE: Reply

Will Look itnto it. Suspect it's curve mappings
Bharat

 -----Original Message-----
From: Love, Phillip M. 
Sent: Friday, October 05, 2001 8:45 AM
To: Khanna, Bharat
Subject: RE: Reply

I think that the correlations for the points in the Aruba book must be different. Her position is 5 contracts long in the book and her VaR is $500K. Is there any way you can tell me the correlations that are being used for the points that she has positions at in that book? The pub codes are : IF-NNG/VENT, NGI/CHI. GATE, CHI./N/BORDER, NGPL-IOWA0ILLIN,UF-NGPL/OK-NW, NGI/CHI./PEOPLE,NGI/CHI./NIPSCO,ML7/CG. Any help you can provide would be much appreciated. Thanks.
PL

 -----Original Message-----
From: Khanna, Bharat 
Sent: Thursday, October 04, 2001 3:25 PM
To: Love, Phillip M.
Subject: Reply

Hey Phillip,
I'm a little busy right now but, will be by later. Hope the graphs below get you start

beliefs_or_signals.message_body:
We have two firm transportation agreements on Tennessee Pipeline. The long term Boston Gas capacity release and a short term contract which expires on 1/31/2002. The monthly demand charge on the short term capacity is $15,200.00.

Do we need to reject the short term capacity before it expires? To my knowledge, we did not flow any gas on this contract for December or January.
beliefs_or_signals.subject: Tennessee contracts
